onChange.script:
system.perspective.print(len("UserName in login page is %s"%str(self.props.text)))
	if len(str(self.props.text)) == 0 or len(str(self.props.text)) == 1:
		system.perspective.print("UserName in if statement of login page is %s"%str(self.props.text))
		self.getSibling("btnSubmit").props.text = 'Next'
		self.getSibling("OTP").position.height = 0
		self.getSibling("FlexContainer").position.height = 0
		self.getSibling("lblwarning").props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("PasswordField").props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("PasswordField").position.height = 0
		self.getSibling("OTP").meta.visible = False
		self.getSibling("OTP").props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("PasswordField").meta.visible = False

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	system.perspective.print("focus event called")
	self.focus()

transforms.code:
if value==False or value==0 or str(value).strip().lower()==str('false').strip():
		userName=self.getSibling("txtUserName").props.text
		userName=str(userName).strip()
		if userName=='' or userName=='null' or userName=='None' or userName==None or userName=='Null':
			import sys
			self.getSibling("txtUserName").focus()
	return value

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here """ Written By: Amitkumar Ravat Written Date: 22/08/2024 Purpose: Send OTP to valid users. """ try: userName = self.getSibling("txtUserName").props.text userPassword = '' dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Login.Authenticate.isAuthenticate(userName, userPassword) pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset) for data in pyData: isAuthenticate = data['Result'] #Authenticate MES User if isAuthenticate == 1: self.session.custom.loggedInUserId = data["Id"] self.session.custom.loggedInUser = data["UserName"] self.session.custom.IsLoggedIn = True self.session.custom.UserRoleID = data["MST_Role_Id"] #Authenticate AD User user_details =Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.ActiveDirectoryUsers.getUserDetails(userName) if str(user_details).upper() == 'None'.upper(): self.getSibling("lblwarning").props.text = "Invalid Account" else: roleId = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Login/getRole",{'userName':userName}) #check role is operator if yes then no OTP required if roleId == 2: self.getSibling("PasswordField").meta.visible = True self.getSibling("PasswordField").position.height = 40 self.getSibling("lblwarning").props.text = '' self.getSibling("OTP").position.height = 0 self.props.text = 'Login' self.getSibling("FlexContainer").position.height = 0 # system.perspective.sendMessage("buttonClick",payload = {}, scope = "page") else: # Specify the user source (replace 'VECV' with your actual AD user source name if changed in future) Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(True) user_source = "VECV" # Get the user object from the user source user = system.user.getUser(user_source, userName) if user is not None: # Get user details self.props.enabled = False email = str(user.getContactInfo()[0]).split(':')[1].strip() self.custom.email = email #OTP generation self.session.custom.OTP = Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.OTP.getOTP() #Mail Body body = "

MES OTP Authentication

" body += "

Please enter Below OTP to Complete MES Authentication.

" body += str(self.session.custom.OTP) body += "

" body+="

If you did not requested for this OTP, Please ignore the mail or contact support

" recipients = [str(email)] #Mail Sending system.net.sendEmail("","mes_email_admin@vecv.in", "MES OTP Auth", body, 1, recipients, smtpProfile = 'SMTPEmail') Project_VECV.PopUp.loader.openLoader(False) #open Popup to enter OTP self.getSibling("OTP").position.height = 40 self.getSibling("OTP").meta.visible = True self.getSibling("FlexContainer").position.height = 40 self.props.enabled = True self.props.text = 'Verify' self.getSibling("PasswordField").meta.visible = False self.getSibling("PasswordField").position.height = 0 self.getSibling("lblwarning").props.text = '' elif isAuthenticate == -2: self.getSibling("lblwarning").props.text = "Invalid Credentials" elif isAuthenticate == -1: self.getSibling("lblwarning").props.text = "Inactive User" else: self.getSibling("lblwarning").props.text = "Credentials Expired" except: screenName ='Login' filePath=str('Project_VECV/Login/Login') errorFunction = str('Message Handler:Auth -> btnSubmit') errorType=str('Application') errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID()) description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

config.script:
""" Written By: AmitKumar ravat Written Date: 25/08/2024 Purpose: Resend OTP. """ self.session.custom.OTP = Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.OTP.getOTP() body = "

MES OTP Authentication

" body += "

Please enter Below OTP to Complete MES Authentication.


" body += str(self.session.custom.OTP) body += "

" body+="

If you did not requested for this OTP, Please ignore the mail or contact support

" recipients = [str(self.parent.parent.getChild("btnSubmit").custom.email)] system.net.sendEmail("","qdigitalization@vecvnet.com", "MES OTP Auth", body, 1, recipients, smtpProfile = 'SMTPEmail')

""" Written By: AmitKumar ravat Written Date: 25/08/2024 Purpose: Resent OTP. """ system.perspective.print("resend") self.session.custom.OTP = Project_VECV.ActiveDirectory.OTP.getOTP() body = "

MES OTP Authentication

" body += "

Please enter Below OTP to Complete MES Authentication.


" body += str(self.session.custom.OTP) body += "

" body+="

If you did not requested for this OTP, Please ignore the mail or contact support

" recipients = [str(self.parent.parent.getChild("btnSubmit").custom.email)] system.net.sendEmail("","qdigitalization@vecvnet.com", "MES OTP Auth", body, 1, recipients, smtpProfile = 'SMTPEmail')

onChange.script:
if currentValue.value != "":
		import hashlib
		val = 'LAxle@1234567890'
		encrypt = hashlib.sha256(val.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
		self.props.text = encrypt
